questions.question: When the scribes and Pharisees brought the woman caught in adultery, what did Jesus do?
options: He wrote on the ground with his finger
He sent her to the priests
questions.answer: He wrote on the ground with his finger

questions.question: Jesus said 'Before Abraham was born, _____.' How did he finish this statement?
Jesus told the woman caught in adultery to go and sin no more.
Jesus said, 'I am the _____ of the world. He who follows me will not walk in the darkness, but will have the light of life.'
You will know the _____, and the _____ will make you free.
